inputs.label: Cash & Equivalents
inputs.businessContext: Cash on hand and highly liquid short-term investments

businessContext_i18n.en: Cash on hand and highly liquid short-term investments
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eldeki nakit ve yüksek likiditeye sahip kısa vadeli yatırımlar

inputs.label: Accounts Receivable
inputs.businessContext: Money owed by customers for goods or services delivered

businessContext_i18n.en: Money owed by customers for goods or services delivered
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teslim edilen mal veya hizmetler için müşterilerin borçlu olduğu para
businessContext_i18n.de: Von Kunden geschuldete Beträge für gelieferte Waren oder erbrachte Dienstleistungen

inputs.label: Inventory
inputs.businessContext: Raw materials, work-in-progress, and finished goods held for sale

businessContext_i18n.en: Raw materials, work-in-progress, and finished goods held for sale
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış için elde tutulan hammaddeler, yarı mamuller ve bitmiş ürünler
businessContext_i18n.de: Rohstoffe, unfertige und fertige Erzeugnisse zum Verkauf

inputs.label: Other Current Assets
inputs.businessContext: Any other short-term assets not included above, such as prepaid expenses

businessContext_i18n.en: Any other short-term assets not included above, such as prepaid expenses
businessContext_i18n.tr: Peşin ödenmiş giderler gibi yukarıda yer almayan diğer kısa vadeli varlıklar
businessContext_i18n.de: Sonstige kurzfristige Vermögenswerte, die nicht oben enthalten sind, wie z. B. Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten

inputs.label: Accounts Payable
inputs.businessContext: Money owed to suppliers for goods and services purchased on credit

businessContext_i18n.en: Money owed to suppliers for goods and services purchased on credit
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredili olarak satın alınan mal ve hizmetler için tedarikçilere borçlu olunan para
businessContext_i18n.de: Geldbeträge, die Lieferanten für auf Kredit gekaufte Waren und Dienstleistungen geschuldet werden

inputs.label: Short-Term Debt
inputs.businessContext: Borrowings and current portion of long-term debt due within one year

businessContext_i18n.en: Borrowings and current portion of long-term debt due within one year
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir yıl içinde vadesi gelen borçlanmalar ve uzun vadeli borcun kısa vadeli kısmı
businessContext_i18n.de: Kreditaufnahmen und kurzfristiger Anteil langfristiger Schulden, die innerhalb eines Jahres fällig werden

inputs.label: Other Current Liabilities
inputs.businessContext: Other obligations due within one year, such as accrued expenses, taxes payable

businessContext_i18n.en: Other obligations due within one year, such as accrued expenses, taxes payable
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahakkuk etmiş giderler, ödenecek vergiler gibi bir yıl içinde vadesi gelen diğer yükümlülükler
businessContext_i18n.de: Andere innerhalb eines Jahres fällige Verpflichtungen, wie z. B. Rückstellungen, Steuerschulden

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
